title: {{ name }}
text:
Due to the lapse in federal funding, this website will not be actively managed. Click here for more information.
DHS.gov Web Performance Metrics 2026
In accordance with the Federal Digital Government Strategy, DHS.gov makes PDF copies of our Google Analytics monthly Web Metrics and Search reports. View the reports for 2026 here.
2026 DHS Congressional Appropriations Reports
The FY 2026 reports posted have met the above requirements and have been provided to the requesting Congressional Committees for not less than 45 days, except as otherwise specified in law.
Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 Budget-in-Brief
The President’s Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 Budget Request for DHS reflects our continued commitment to the security of our homeland and the American public.
Notice of Intent to Withdraw
This Notice advises your school of the Student and Exchange Visitor Program's (SEVP) intent to withdraw your school's SEVP certification for failing to comply with the federal regulations detailed below. During a records review of Harvard University. compliance issues were identified that may result in the withdrawal of your school's certification and bar any further enrollment or education of nonimmigrant students.
Know2Protect: Year in Review
April 2025 marks the one-year anniversary of the Know2Protect campaign. This document highlights Know2Protect’s achievements in its first year to prevent and combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.
DHS Cultural Resource Management Program Directive and Instruction
Subject to the availability of funds, this Directive and Instruction establish policies and responsibilities for the appropriate creation and management of cultural resource programs throughout the Department of Homeland Security (DHS or Department), in accordance with applicable federal statutory and regulatory requirements, Executive Orders (EOs), and Presidential Memoranda.
